response.title: Response within 24h

secure.title: 100% Secure
secure.desc: Your data is encrypted end-to-end. We comply with the strictest banking standards.

nofees.title: No hidden fees
nofees.desc: The advertised rate is the rate applied. No surprises on your monthly payments.

how.title: How does it work?
how.s1d: Choose the amount and term that suit you. We immediately calculate your estimated monthly payment.
how.s2d: Fill out the form in 5 minutes and upload your supporting documents (ID, proof of address, payslips).
how.s3d: Once approved by our team, sign your contract electronically and securely.
how.s4d: Once the legal period has passed, funds are available in your DGFP BANK wallet, ready to be withdrawn.

partners.title: A trusted banking network
partners.desc: We work with the main European financial institutions to guarantee fast and secure transfers.

finalCta.title: Ready to bring your projects to life?

footer.legal: A loan commits you and must be repaid. Check your repayment capacity before committing.

slides.s2t: Manage your finances in real time
slides.s2d: Clear dashboard, analytics and smart alerts.

security.title: Top-tier banking protection
security.desc: Our systems meet the strictest European banking standards.
security.f1d: Your data is protected by military-grade encryption.
security.f3d: Two-factor validation for every sensitive operation.
security.f4d: Dedicated advisors available at all hours.

testi.title: They trust us
testi.t1q: A smooth and professional banking experience. Support is outstanding.
testi.t2q: International transfers are fast and security is impeccable.
testi.t3q: Finally a digital bank that combines simplicity with institutional seriousness.

mobile.title: Your entire bank, in the palm of your hand

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I open an account?
faq.a1: Sign up online in under 5 minutes with a valid ID document.
faq.a2: Our standard plan has no hidden fees. Everyday operations are free.
faq.a3: Deposits are guaranteed up to €100,000 by the Deposit Guarantee Fund.
faq.a4: Our team is reachable 24/7 via secure chat, email or phone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is a core part of our banking trust commitment.

sections.p: Identity (name, date of birth), contact (email, phone, address), financial data (income, IBAN, loan information), technical data (IP, browser, device fingerprint), and behavioural data (sessions, clicks, security events).
Open and manage your account, evaluate loan applications, prevent fraud and money laundering, meet legal obligations, and improve our services.
Performance of a contract, legitimate interest in fraud prevention, legal obligation (AML/KYC), and your explicit consent for marketing.
Limited to vetted processors (cloud hosting, identity verification, payment networks), regulators and judicial authorities upon legal request.
Account data: while the relationship is active plus 10 years (AML). Security logs: 24 months. Cookies: as set in our cookie policy.
Access, rectification, deletion, restriction, portability, and objection. Contact privacy@bnpparibas.com. You may file a complaint with your national data protection authority.
Encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, device fingerprinting, anomaly detection, MFA on sensitive actions, and a 24/7 incident response process.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: By using DGFP BANK you accept the terms below.

sections.p: You must be at least 18, a resident of an eligible country, and able to enter binding contracts.
Provide accurate information, keep credentials confidential, and notify us of any suspected compromise.
No fraud, money laundering, terrorism financing, market abuse, automated scraping, or any activity prohibited by applicable law.
Disclosed in-app before each operation. We may update fees with 30 days' notice.
We are liable for direct losses caused by our gross negligence. We do not cover indirect, consequential or speculative losses.
We may suspend access immediately if we suspect fraud, AML risk, or breach of these terms.
French law unless mandatory consumer law of your residence applies. Disputes go to the competent French courts subject to consumer protections.

list: Strictly necessary — authentication, session, security (no consent required).
Security — device fingerprinting for fraud detection (legitimate interest).

sections.p: You can clear cookies in your browser settings at any time. Disabling strictly necessary cookies will prevent you from signing in.
DGFP BANK — SAS with capital of 1,000,000 EUR — registered office: 1 Centenary Square, Birmingham, B1 1HQ, United Kingdom. RCS Birmingham 000 000 000.
DGFP BANK Compliance Office.
Cloudflare Workers — 101 Townsend St, San Francisco, CA 94107, USA.
support@dgfp.com
All trademarks, logos and content remain the property of DGFP BANK or its licensors. Any reproduction without written authorisation is prohibited.
DGFP BANK applies a zero-tolerance approach to money laundering, terrorism financing and sanctions evasion, in line with EU directives (AMLD5/6), FATF recommendations, and applicable national laws.
Identity verification (government ID + selfie liveness), proof of address, source-of-funds checks, and continuous monitoring of transactions.
Applied to politically exposed persons (PEPs), high-risk jurisdictions, and complex or unusual transactions.
Real-time screening against EU, UN, OFAC and UK consolidated lists.
Suspicious activity reports filed with the competent Financial Intelligence Unit. Tipping-off is strictly prohibited.
All staff receive annual AML/KYC training. An independent MLRO supervises the program.
We apply bank-grade controls to every account: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest, hardware-backed key management, segregated client funds at top-tier custodian banks.
Strong customer authentication (SCA) compliant with PSD2: password + device fingerprint + one-time code on sensitive actions.
24/7 anomaly detection: new-device alerts, geo-velocity checks, unusual transfer patterns, behaviour scoring.
Bank secrecy applies. Financial data is shared only with you, regulators, or upon a valid court order.
Keep your credentials private, register trusted devices, enable notifications, and report anything suspicious to support immediately.

loanTerms.title: Loan & Credit Terms
loanTerms.subtitle: Borrowing engages you. Repay your loan and check your repayment capacity before committing.

sections.p: Verified identity, stable income, no active default. We perform credit and AML/KYC checks before approval.
From 1,000 EUR to 500,000 EUR, 12 to 120 months. Approved amounts depend on your file and applicable law.
Fixed rate disclosed in your offer. The APR includes interest and mandatory fees.
Funds are released after contract signature and ID verification. Releases above 50,000 EUR follow a staged anti-fraud process (63% / 88% / 100%).
Monthly direct debit on a fixed day. Early repayment is allowed with the legal cap on indemnities.
Late payments trigger interest, fees and may lead to acceleration, registration on payment incident databases and judicial recovery.
You have 14 calendar days from contract signature to withdraw without cause.
Monthly installments are debited on the agreed date from your declared IBAN. The schedule is visible from your dashboard.
Allowed at any time. Indemnity capped per consumer law (0.5% to 1% of capital repaid early depending on remaining duration).

list: Day 1–7: friendly reminder, no extra fee.
Day 8–30: late fee + statutory default interest.
Day 31+: formal notice and possible acceleration of the loan.

sections.p: We always prefer an amicable solution. Persistent default may lead to registration with central payment-incident files and judicial recovery.
If you face genuine hardship, contact us immediately. We can offer payment holidays, rescheduling, or temporary reductions where eligible.
